'''竏嗷-sh-t-k''' ('''karashtekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:excoriate|excoriate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:excoriate|excoriate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗷-sh-t-k
|-
! Lemma
| karashtekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirashtekoko|thirashtekoko]] || [[word:jirashtekoko|jirashtekoko]] || [[word:shirashtekoko|shirashtekoko]] || [[word:kirashtekoko|kirashtekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurashtekoko|thuthurashtekoko]] || [[word:jujurashtekoko|jujurashtekoko]] || [[word:shushurashtekoko|shushurashtekoko]] || [[word:kukurashtekoko|kukurashtekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurashtekoko|thurashtekoko]] || [[word:jurashtekoko|jurashtekoko]] || [[word:shurashtekoko|shurashtekoko]] || [[word:kurashtekoko|kurashtekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurashtekoko|thurashtekoko]] || [[word:jurashtekoko|jurashtekoko]] || [[word:shurashtekoko|shurashtekoko]] || [[word:kurashtekoko|kurashtekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therashtekoko|therashtekoko]] || [[word:jerashtekoko|jerashtekoko]] || [[word:sherashtekoko|sherashtekoko]] || [[word:kerashtekoko|kerashtekoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorashtekoko|thorashtekoko]] || [[word:jorashtekoko|jorashtekoko]] || [[word:shorashtekoko|shorashtekoko]] || [[word:korashtekoko|korashtekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦrashtekoko|thﾃｦrashtekoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦrashtekoko|jﾃｦrashtekoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦrashtekoko|shﾃｦrashtekoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦrashtekoko|kﾃｦrashtekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharashtekoko|thatharashtekoko]] || [[word:jajarashtekoko|jajarashtekoko]] || [[word:shasharashtekoko|shasharashtekoko]] || [[word:kakarashtekoko|kakarashtekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharashtekoko|tharashtekoko]] || [[word:jarashtekoko|jarashtekoko]] || [[word:sharashtekoko|sharashtekoko]] || [[word:karashtekoko|karashtekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharashtekoko|tharashtekoko]] || [[word:jarashtekoko|jarashtekoko]] || [[word:sharashtekoko|sharashtekoko]] || [[word:karashtekoko|karashtekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
